seo.title: AAVE/USDT Funding Rates on Hyperliquid DEX - Live Data
seo.description: Track AAVE/USDT funding rates on Hyperliquid DEX. 1-hour funding intervals, on-chain order book, and arbitrage opportunities for DeFi tokens.

content.intro: AAVE/USDT perpetual futures on Hyperliquid offer unique funding rate arbitrage opportunities within a fully on-chain DEX environment. As the governance token of one of DeFi's largest lending protocols, AAVE exhibits distinct funding patterns driven by both DeFi narratives and institutional adoption cycles.
content.how_funding_works: Hyperliquid calculates funding rates every hour using a premium/discount mechanism based on the perpetual contract's deviation from the underlying AAVE spot price. The 1-hour funding interval provides 24 settlement opportunities daily, significantly more frequent than the standard 8-hour cycles on centralized exchanges. Funding payments are automatically debited or credited to trader positions at each hourly settlement, with rates typically ranging from -0.01% to +0.01% per hour during normal market conditions.
content.why_this_pair: AAVE's role as a DeFi governance token creates funding rate inefficiencies during protocol updates, partnership announcements, and broader DeFi market cycles. The token's moderate volatility and established liquidity make it suitable for funding rate arbitrage strategies, while its correlation with overall DeFi sentiment provides predictable rate patterns during sector rotations.

sections.heading: Historical AAVE Funding Rate Patterns
sections.body: AAVE funding rates on Hyperliquid typically range from -2% to +3% annually during normal market conditions. Positive funding rates dominate during DeFi bull markets when traders maintain heavy long exposure, often spiking above +5% annualized during major protocol upgrades or partnership announcements. Negative rates frequently occur during broader crypto downturns when short interest exceeds long demand. The 1-hour funding cycle on Hyperliquid tends to smooth out extreme rate spikes compared to 8-hour cycles, though flash events can still drive rates above +10% annualized for brief periods.

sections.heading: Arbitrage Opportunities and Strategies
sections.body: AAVE funding rate arbitrage on Hyperliquid benefits from the platform's rapid settlement cycles and low maker fees of 0.02%. Delta-neutral strategies involve longing AAVE perpetuals during negative funding periods while shorting equivalent spot exposure on other platforms. The 1-hour funding frequency allows for more responsive position adjustments compared to traditional 8-hour cycles. Cross-exchange arbitrage opportunities emerge when Hyperliquid's AAVE funding diverges significantly from rates on Binance or OKX, typically during periods of high DeFi volatility or liquidity imbalances.

sections.heading: Risk Considerations for AAVE Trading
sections.body: AAVE's governance token status introduces specific risks including voting events that can trigger sudden price movements and funding rate spikes. Protocol risks from the underlying Aave lending platform, such as smart contract vulnerabilities or governance attacks, can cause immediate deleveraging. Hyperliquid's newer platform status means limited historical data for extreme market events, requiring careful position sizing. The USDC-only ecosystem creates additional risk if USDC depegging occurs, though this also presents arbitrage opportunities for sophisticated traders managing multi-token exposure.

faq.question: How often are AAVE funding rates calculated on Hyperliquid?
faq.answer: Hyperliquid calculates and settles AAVE funding rates every hour, providing 24 funding payments per day. This is significantly more frequent than most centralized exchanges that use 8-hour cycles.

faq.question: What drives AAVE funding rate changes on Hyperliquid?
faq.answer: AAVE funding rates are primarily driven by the premium or discount of the perpetual contract relative to spot prices, influenced by trader sentiment around DeFi markets, Aave protocol developments, and overall market leverage demand.

faq.question: Can I earn funding fees by holding AAVE perpetuals on Hyperliquid?
faq.answer: Yes, you earn funding fees when holding the less popular side of the market. If funding is positive, shorts collect from longs every hour, and vice versa when funding is negative.

faq.question: What are typical AAVE funding rates on Hyperliquid?
faq.answer: AAVE funding rates typically range from -2% to +3% annualized during normal conditions, but can spike above +10% during major DeFi events or market volatility. The hourly settlement helps moderate extreme rates compared to longer funding cycles.
